parameters.subject: =Urgent: your appointment is coming up soon
parameters.html:
=

Your appointment is coming up soon

Hey {{ $json.customer_name }},

Your appointment is coming up soon:

  • Service: {{ $json.service }}
  • Time: {{ $json.appointment_time }}

Please confirm now:

Confirm Appointment

Customers that do not confirm will lose their appointment slot.

Thank you.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  customer_name,
  email,
  service,
  appointment_time,
  status,
  confirmed,
  confirmation_token,
  CONCAT('https://n8n.systack.net/webhook/systack-confirm-booking?token=', confirmation_token) AS confirm_link
FROM bookings
WHERE
  confirmed = FALSE
  AND COALESCE(reminder_2h_sent, FALSE) = FALSE
  AND status NOT IN ('canceled', 'cancelled', 'completed', 'no_show')
  AND appointment_time - INTERVAL '2 hours' <= NOW()
  AND appointment_time > NOW()
ORDER BY appointment_time ASC
LIMIT 50;

UPDATE bookings
SET
  reminder_2h_sent = TRUE,
  reminder_2h_sent_at = NOW(),
  status = 'at_risk',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $('Postgres - Find 2H Due Reminders1').item.json.id }}
RETURNING *;
